title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at ITC Limited Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at ITC Limited Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
We at ITC Limited Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ITC Limited Digital Technologies:
ITC Limited Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Limited Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
